title: henckelia pulchella
intro: Henckelia pulchella, also known as the Indian pipe cress or toothache plant, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Henckelia pulchella include its ability to alleviate toothache pain, reduce inflammation, and treat digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
